name: Community Task Agent
description: Coordinates useful community tasks such as feedback, bug reports, tutorials, memes, notes, and research with proof review.
degenPitch: Turn community chaos into reviewed tasks with receipts.
whatItDoes: Publishes community tasks with clear acceptance rules.
Accepts proof submissions and review decisions.
Creates receipt trails for accepted work.
feeBehavior: Task rewards and paid submissions require proof review before receipt-bound unlock or reward flow.
cursorPrompt: Build a Community Task Agent using DNA x402. Create tasks, collect proof URL/hash/timestamp, require human review, issue receipt after acceptance, and do not create spam automation.
suggestedPrompt: Build a Community Task Agent using DNA x402. Create tasks, collect proof URL/hash/timestamp, require human review, issue receipt after acceptance, and do not create spam automation.
receiptProofBehavior: Human review is required before reward.
